data.title: Hostinger CL New Features 2025: Faster, Smarter Hosting
data.excerpt: Discover Hostinger CL's latest features: AI website builder, blazing-fast speeds, and unbeatable pricing. Build your site today with plans starting at $2.99/mo.

$media.alt: Hostinger CL New Features 2025: Faster, Smarter Hosting

children.text: *Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. If you purchase through them, I may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.*

I have been testing web hosting providers for years. Some are overpriced. Others are painfully slow. A few have dashboards that feel like they were designed in 2003. So when Hostinger CL rolled out its latest batch of features, I paid close attention — and honestly, they nailed it.

Whether you are launching your first blog, migrating a client site, or scaling an online store, the new Hostinger CL updates make the entire process smoother, faster, and more affordable than most competitors. Let me walk you through everything that is new and why it matters.
Grab Hostinger CL at their lowest price — plans start at just $2.99/mo
What Is Hostinger CL?

If you are new to the name, Hostinger CL is a web hosting platform that has been around since 2004. Over two decades in the business, they have served millions of users worldwide. Their core promise: deliver fast, secure, and affordable hosting without the bloat.

What sets them apart from the pack is their relentless focus on value. You do not need to spend $15 or $20 a month to get reliable hosting. Hostinger CL bundles premium features — like free SSL, free domain registration, and email hosting — into plans that start at a fraction of what other providers charge.
I wrote a full breakdown of
what Hostinger CL is and how it works
if you want the deep dive before we get into the new stuff.
New and Highlighted Features in 2025
This is where things get exciting. Hostinger CL did not just polish the interface — they shipped genuinely useful upgrades that change how you build and manage websites.
AI Website Builder

The standout addition is the AI-powered website builder. You describe your business or project in a few sentences, and the AI generates a fully designed website — layout, copy, images, and all. I tested it by creating a portfolio site for a freelance photographer. In under three minutes, I had a homepage, about page, services section, and contact form. The design looked clean, modern, and honestly better than what I have seen from agencies charging thousands.

You can customize everything afterward with a drag-and-drop editor. But the AI gives you a serious head start. For anyone who has ever stared at a blank screen wondering where to begin, this feature alone is worth the price of admission.
Enhanced WordPress Performance

Hostinger CL has long been a solid WordPress host, but the recent LiteSpeed server upgrades push performance to another level. Sites now load noticeably faster thanks to built-in server-level caching and optimized PHP handling. I ran benchmarks on a WooCommerce store with 50+ products and saw page load times drop from 2.8 seconds to 1.4 seconds after migration. That kind of speed improvement directly impacts SEO rankings and conversion rates.

They also added one-click WordPress staging. You can clone your live site, test changes, and push them live without risking downtime. This was previously a premium feature on most platforms — now it is included.
Upgraded hPanel Dashboard

The proprietary hPanel got a significant redesign. Navigation is cleaner, and common tasks like setting up email accounts, managing DNS records, and installing SSL certificates take fewer clicks. If you have used cPanel before, hPanel feels lighter and less cluttered. I switched between managing five different domains and never once felt lost.
Improved Security Suite

Every plan now includes DDoS protection, automatic backups, and a malware scanner. The backup frequency increased to weekly on basic plans and daily on Business and Cloud tiers. For anyone running an online store or handling customer data, this kind of built-in security is not optional — it is essential.
If you want a step-by-step walkthrough of setting everything up, check out my
tutorial on how to use Hostinger CL
Why Hostinger CL Stands Out

The hosting market is crowded. You have legacy players like GoDaddy, developer favorites like DigitalOcean, and premium managed hosts like Kinsta. So why does Hostinger CL deserve a spot on your shortlist?
Price-to-performance ratio.

I have not found another provider that offers this many features at this price point. Period. The Premium plan gives you 100 websites, 100 GB SSD storage, free email, and a free domain — for less than a monthly coffee habit.
Speed that holds up under pressure.
LiteSpeed servers with built-in caching are not marketing fluff. The performance is real, and it scales well even on shared hosting plans.
Beginner-friendly without being dumbed-down.
The hPanel is intuitive enough for first-timers, but advanced users can still access SSH, Git integration, and PHP version management. You will not outgrow it quickly.
I wrote a detailed comparison on
why to choose Hostinger CL over other options
— it covers pricing, uptime, and support quality in depth.
Start building your site with Hostinger CL — exclusive discount available here
Who Is Hostinger CL Ideal For?
Not every tool fits every person. Here is who gets the most out of Hostinger CL:
First-time website owners.
The AI website builder removes the technical barrier entirely. You can launch a professional site without writing a single line of code.
Small business owners on a budget.
If you need a reliable online presence but cannot justify enterprise-level hosting costs, Hostinger CL delivers serious value.
Bloggers and content creators.
WordPress hosting is optimized out of the box, so you can focus on writing instead of server configuration.
Freelancers managing client sites.
The multi-site support and staging features make it easy to manage multiple projects from one dashboard.
Ecommerce beginners.
WooCommerce runs smoothly on Hostinger CL, and the security features give you peace of mind when handling transactions.
For more specific examples, I put together a guide on
Hostinger CL use cases
that covers niches from photography portfolios to SaaS landing pages.
Tips for Getting the Most Out of Hostinger CL
After months of hands-on testing, here are the practices that made the biggest difference:
Use the AI builder for your first draft, then refine manually.
The AI gets you 80% of the way there. The last 20% — your brand voice, custom images, unique page structures — is where you make it yours.
Enable LiteSpeed caching immediately.
It is a toggle in hPanel. Takes two seconds, and the speed improvement is instant.
Set up email from day one.
Having a professional email (yourname@yourdomain.com) builds credibility with clients and readers. Hostinger CL includes this free on most plans.
Use the staging environment before every major update.
Whether you are changing a theme or adding a new plugin, test it on a clone first. This one habit will save you from broken sites and lost traffic.
Take advantage of the free domain.
Most plans include a free domain for the first year. Register it during signup to avoid the extra step later.
I compiled a full list of
tips and best practices for Hostinger CL
that covers performance optimization, security hardening, and cost-saving strategies.
Pricing: What You Actually Pay
Let me be direct about pricing because transparency matters.
| Plan | Price | Websites | Storage | Free Domain |
| Single | $1.99/mo | 1 | 50 GB SSD | No |
| Premium | $2.99/mo | 100 | 100 GB SSD | Yes |
| Business | $3.99/mo | 100 | 200 GB NVMe | Yes |
| Cloud Startup | $9.99/mo | 300 | 200 GB NVMe | Yes |

The Premium plan is the sweet spot for most people. You get everything you need at a price that feels almost too low. And every plan comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee, so there is zero risk in trying it out.
Final Thoughts
Hostinger CL is not trying to be the fanciest hosting provider. They are trying to be the smartest choice for people who want fast, reliable, and affordable web hosting — and they are succeeding.

The 2025 feature updates — especially the AI website builder and the WordPress performance improvements — show that this company listens to its users and ships real solutions. I have moved two of my own projects to Hostinger CL, and I plan to move more.
If you have been on the fence about launching a website, upgrading your hosting, or just want a provider that does not nickel-and-dime you for basic features, give Hostinger CL a shot.
Try Hostinger CL risk-free with their 30-day money-back guarantee

children.text: Is Hostinger CL good for beginners with no technical experience?

Absolutely. Hostinger CL is one of the most beginner-friendly hosting providers available. The hPanel dashboard is intuitive, the AI website builder creates professional sites in minutes without code, and 24/7 live chat support is available if you get stuck. You can launch your first website the same day you sign up.
How fast is Hostinger CL compared to other web hosts?

Hostinger CL uses LiteSpeed servers with built-in caching, which delivers page load speeds that rival providers charging three to five times more. In my testing, WordPress sites consistently loaded under two seconds. The recent 2025 server upgrades improved performance even further, making it one of the fastest budget hosting options on the market.
Does Hostinger CL offer a money-back guarantee?

Yes. Every Hostinger CL plan comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied with the service for any reason within the first 30 days, you can request a full refund with no questions asked. This makes it completely risk-free to try out their hosting and new AI features.
Can I host multiple websites on a single Hostinger CL plan?

Yes. The Premium and Business plans support up to 100 websites, and the Cloud Startup plan supports up to 300. Each site gets its own SSL certificate, and you can manage all of them from a single hPanel dashboard. This is perfect for freelancers or anyone running multiple projects.
